MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evyn Shomer for San Francisco Public Guardian (Trustee)

Ms. Shomer requested a 30-day continuance, stating that the petition was prepared and ready to file when she saw errors. The Status Hearing on Filing of Account is continued to June 12, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-20-2018 Continued To May-15-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evyn Shomer for SF Public Guardian (Trustee)

Ms. Shomer requested a continuance stating there was a $0.00 balance during the entire accounting period, that the only asset is one piece of property that was sold last Wednesday, and that she did not want to account for the initial deposit of the buyers in the event the sale did not go through. Ms. Shomer also stated that there is a hiccup with closing of escrow, that there is a mechanic's lien of $13,000 with a request of $38,000 in interest which is being negotiated, asked for an extension of the accounting period until after close of escrow, and stated that she is not sure when escrow will close. The status on filing of first account s continued to May 15, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will allow extension of the accounting to include close of escrow.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (122 Tioga Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Mar-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Evyn Shomer for SF Public Guardian

The sale was confirmed at $600,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed February 14, 2018. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No bond is required. The Court informed Counsel that the order will not include contract of sale.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Continued To Mar-20-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (122 Tioga Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Continued To Mar-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Evyn Shomer for San Francisco Public Guardian.

The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is continued to March 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to address the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes with regard to amending the petition to include the terms of the sale and for proper notice to be given.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (122 Tioga Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Jan-17-2018 Continued To Feb-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Evyn Shomer for San Francisco Public Guardian.

Ms. Shomer stated that Shirley Yawitz (Probate Referee) has completed the re-appraisal for sale, that she was unable to file it and that notice will be provided to the Beneficiary (SPCA) of the Trust. The Court stated that it makes sense to amend the petition to include the terms regarding close of escrow. Ms. Shomer also informed the Court that the Broker will be leaving the Country for a period of time and requested a continuance to a date after his return. The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is continued to February 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
